summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in colocation (Colo) and build layers, with Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra, and Gujarat as key states. The top policy hook is India's 131 regulation signals, notably bank attachment notices. Value-chain movers are Colo (410 signals) and Build (33). Foreign hyperscalers are scaling: Google ($15bn), Meta ($900M), AWS ($13B), Microsoft ($57B), Amazon ($48B), and AirTrunk ($5B).
